ground_truth.title: The CrowdStrike Falcon Platform
ground_truth.main_content:
The Agentic Security Platform.
Unified and built to secure the AI revolution.

Latest Innovations

Enterprise Graph: The industry's richest AI-ready data layer for cybersecurity

Charlotte AI AgentWorks: Build, orchestrate, and scale AI agents securely

New Dynamic User Experience: Natural language queries, role-specific workspaces, and instant dashboards

Agentic Security Workforce: Mission-ready agents out of the box to automate high-impact workflows

Agentic Response Collaboration: Charlotte AI connects humans and trusted agents for secure collaboration

Onum: Agentic SOC transformation starts with real-time, high-quality, AI-ready data.

Speed up investigations, lower costs, stronger protection — powered by agentic security.

40 hrs/wk

Average savings per week by automating detection triage.

$6 /every $1

Average return per dollar invested in the Falcon platform.

100%

Detection coverage (validated in MITRE Round 5).

Quantify the value of consolidating with CrowdStrike

Lower costs. Greater efficiency. Enhanced security.

Explore the Agentic Security Platform

Enterprise Graph: The AI-Ready Data Layer

Enterprise Graph unifies CrowdStrike's pioneering graph technology with telemetry from across the enterprise to build a living, connected model of the enterprise – with one common query language built for AI.

Mission-Ready Agents: Automating Analyst Workflows

CrowdStrike's first fleet of agents are designed to handle critical security workflows and automate repetitive tasks better suited for machines, freeing analysts to focus on higher-value work and accelerating outcomes.

Charlotte AI AgentWorks: Build and Deploy Agents at Scale

Charlotte AI AgentWorks is the first no-code platform that lets any team quickly build, test, deploy, and manage trusted security agents. Using natural language, defenders can set goals, define data, and control agent behavior — without writing code.

New Dynamic User Experience

New persona-aware console delivers natural language querying, role-specific workspaces, and instant dashboards that let defenders see, visualize, and act across domains with a single click.

Operating Center of the Agentic Ecosystem

The Agent Collaboration Framework makes Charlotte the SOC commander, securely connecting to systems, data, and agents for richer, more contextual investigations.

Secure AI where AI happens

Secure data, models, agents, identities, infrastructure, and interactions — from enterprise AI development through workforce AI usage.

Trusted by organizations everywhere

See the Falcon platform in action

CrowdStrike recognized as a Leader

Customer Stories

The Falcon platform has allowed us to unify our security toolbox. It yields big savings for us, but more importantly, it allows us to focus."

Kevin Tsuei, SVP Information Security Officer, CBC

Unified security wasn't a want, it was a necessity. Going from a bare-bones stack to a robust, integrated platform used to feel like a pipe dream. Now it's our reality."

Richard Lee, Director of Cybersecurity and Privacy, the ALDO Group

We run a lot of virtual desktop infrastructure (VDI), so we didn't want our endpoint agent slowing down login or boot-up times. CrowdStrike was the superstar of the POC, so we bought it."

Tahir Ali, CTO and CISO, Montage Health

Start protecting with the Falcon platform today

Discover why thousands of organizations trust the Falcon platform to stop breaches.
